title: posting.rs: N+1 query in list_conversations
description: File: src/posting.rs (list_conversations). For each conversation post, the code issues: 1) load_status (itself does multiple queries), 2) a COUNT query for read markers, 3) fetch_account_row for the author, 4) a query for mention_rows, 5) individual queries for each mentioned remote account. For a page of 20 conversations, this could be 100+ DB round trips. Should batch-load participants and read markers.
